content.en:
Extreme Demon Domain.

Ye Tian came here as a Void Sparrow, and to enter the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, he had to pass through the Extreme Dao Demon Domain before he could enter.

Of course, it can also be accessed from the original Black Sea.

However, if Ye Tian entered the Extreme Dao Demon Domain from the Primordial Black Sea, he would not be able to withstand the investigation.

Therefore, he still honestly entered the Extreme Dao Demon Domain from the Extreme Dao Demon Gate, and entering here requires a toll, that is, an Extreme Dao coin.

Although the Extreme Demon Realm does not have a strong person above the perfect controller of the True Realm, this is a paradise for the perfect controller of the Void Realm, and the perfect controller of the Void Realm can control their own destiny here.

As a result, many of the Extreme Dao creatures who had offended the big people had come to the Extreme Demon Domain, making the Extreme Demon Domain very prosperous.

In addition, the original intention of the construction of the Extreme Dao Demon Domain was also to cultivate more Extreme Dao creatures, just like the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

It's just that the Extreme Dao Source Sea is the initial experiment, and the Extreme Dao Demon Domain is built later, and the rules are more perfect.

At least in the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, you can break through to the realm of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, but not in the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

"The Extreme Dao Source Sea, the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, and other areas are all created by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea powerhouses, just to greatly increase the number of Extreme Dao creatures. In terms of the number of living beings, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea is far less than one billionth of the end of the realm, although every Extreme Dao creature can grow, but if it does not grow to the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, it is meaningless. Therefore, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace seems to increase the probability of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea giving birth to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller!"

Ye Tian guessed.

In front of the Extreme Demon Gate.

Ye Tian sensed the surroundings, there were many strong people stationed here, all of them were from the Extreme Dao Corps.

The Extreme Dao Corps is the corps force under the command of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, the individual combat effectiveness is not strong, but the group combat effectiveness is very terrifying, and the Extreme Dao secret techniques they practice can be complemented and superimposed.

However, the strongest of the Extreme Dao creatures stationed here is only the Perfect Controller of the True Realm, and it is impossible for the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm to be stationed here.

After Ye Tian paid the fee for an Extreme Dao Coin, he passed through the Extreme Dao Demon Gate and truly entered the Extreme Dao Demon Domain.

Not long after, Ye Tian shuttled to the Extreme Demon City.

"There are so many Perfect Masters of the Void!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

Obviously, there are many people who have been affected by these auctions, and most of them are under the command of some big people.

After all, this auction has a causal purple flower!

The Purple Flower of Cause and Effect represents the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, everyone wants to comprehend the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, and the Extreme Path of Extreme Cause and Effect may not have any attack power, but it is the most terrifying Extreme Path of Cause and Effect.

So far, there has not been a single Extreme Path creature in the Extreme Deep Sea who has comprehended the true Extreme Path of Cause and Effect.

But even if a causal purple flower can't make those big people comprehend the ultimate causal path, it can improve the attainment of the causal pole a little!

Many of the great people who have minored in the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect have only comprehended the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect and are in the introductory realm, if they use the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect to raise the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the realm of Xiaocheng, then it would be good!

No one dares to offend a strong person who is proficient in the extreme path of cause and effect, after all, once there is a causal connection, unless one's own extreme path of cause and effect surpasses the other party, or it is a special treasure, it will not be able to evade the pursuit of the other party at all.

This is the most terrifying part of the path of cause and effect.

If you comprehend the extreme path of cause and effect in the extreme realm, even if you hide in the primordial Black Sea, it is useless, and you will still be found.

It is precisely because of this that Ye Tian also attaches great importance to the causal purple flower.

"I don't need to snatch the causal purple flower, I just need to see the causal purple flower and I can copy it. Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he is not in a hurry, just waiting for the auction to start.

Sometimes, however, things simply don't go the way he thinks.

this day.

A group of Extreme Creatures are discussing in the Extreme Demon City.

"It has been determined that the Cause and Effect Purple Flower is being kept in the No. 6 treasure house of the Extreme Dao Demon City Auction Hall, and the master has already issued an order, we can't wait until the auction starts, otherwise we have too little hope of capturing the Cause and Effect Purple Flower. "

"Yes, there are too many extreme creatures staring at the causal purple flower now. Those big names in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace are all interested, and our strength is far from being able to compete with so many Extreme Dao creatures, so we must act in advance. "

"We only need to break through the No. 6 Treasure Vault, take the Cause and Effect Purple Flower, and then leave the Extreme Demon Domain as fast as possible, as long as we enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the master will come to pick us up. When the time comes, the other big names of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace will not stop us. "

"Once the master's order is completed, each of us can become the perfect master of the True Realm, so this mission must be successfully completed!"

"The circle of the sixth treasure house is not simple, how can we break the circle?"

"Don't worry, the master has passed on the mystery of the magic circle, plus the secret treasure given by the master, you can penetrate the magic circle and form a temporary passage. I need you to create chaos and provide us with an opportunity to capture the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect. "

"Got it!"

Soon, these extreme creatures went their separate ways to prepare.

......

Another time has passed, and it is not long before the auction begins.

Ye Tian was cultivating in the Extreme Dao Demon City, and suddenly felt a violent shock.

Rumble!!!!

The fluctuations of the battle came.

"There are Extreme Path creatures fighting in the Extreme Demon City?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Extreme Demon City is not allowed to fight, and this is the only place where Extreme Demon Domain is not allowed to fight.

Once you fight here, you will be suppressed by the Guardians of the Extreme Demon Domain.

And the Extreme Dao Demon Domain's Town Guard Corps is a branch of the Extreme Dao Legion, each of them is a perfect controller of the Void Realm, and so many soldiers of the Town Guard Corps have joined forces to perform the Combined Extreme Path Secret Technique, even the weaker True Realm Perfect Controller may be suppressed.

Therefore, no Extreme Path creature dares to do anything here.

This time, there was really a Extreme Creature who did it.

In an instant, Ye Tian sensed both sides of the action.

"It's the Extreme Demon City Auction House, could it be ......"

Ye Tian guessed a possibility, that is, there was an Extreme Dao creature that made a move in advance and snatched away the causal purple flower.

If that's the case, then it's impossible for him to see the causal purple flower at auction.

If he can't see the causal purple flower, how can he copy it?

At this time, many Extreme Dao creatures began to spy on time and space, so as to lock on the location of the causal purple flower.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian locked on one of the Extreme Dao creatures, which was an Extreme Dao creature at the pinnacle of the Infinite Realm Perfect Controller, and it was extremely close to the True Realm Perfect Controller.

At this time, the other party had already broken the blockade of many Extreme Path creatures in the Extreme Demon City, rushed out of the Extreme Demon City, and shuttled towards the Extreme Demon Gate.

Obviously, the other party wants to escape from the Extreme Dao Demon Domain and return to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

At this time, Ye Tian was hesitating whether he wanted to make a move, if he didn't do it, this extreme creature would take the Cause and Effect Purple Flower and escape, then he didn't want to see the Cause and Effect Purple Flower.

"Do it!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect is too important to him, if he comprehends the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect of the Extreme Realm, then no matter how powerful the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are in the future, they will not be able to lock his position, and they will not be able to find his body and other replica bodies, so he will be truly safe!

As for exposing the identity of the Void Sparrow, it doesn't matter, it's a big deal to change the vest and manage it well.
